description: Implement universal executor/auditor exchange ledger loop as roadmap item 10. Create governance/exchange-ledger-protocol.md defining the traceable loop mechanism between executor and auditor roles through ledger entries.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap progression from completed item 9 (AUDIT-AUTHORITY-LOCK-DEV-EXECUTION-LOCK) to item 10 (UNIVERSAL EXECUTOR / AUDITOR EXCHANGE LEDGER LOOP)
